item.title: Expel Quarterly Threat Report, volume I: Q3 2024 by the numbers
item.description: Volume I of our Quarterly Threat Report summarizes key findings and stats from Q3 of 2024. Learn what to focus on right now.

item.title: Expel Quarterly Threat Report Q3 2024, volume II: CAPTCHA trick or treat
item.description: Volume II of our Q3 2024 Quarterly Threat Report focuses on malicious CAPTCHAs. Learn what to focus on right now.

item.title: Expel Quarterly Threat Report Q3 2024, volume III: Malware trends
item.description: Volume III of our Q3 2024 Quarterly Threat Report focuses on malware trends. Learn what to focus on right now.

item.title: Expel Quarterly Threat Report Q3 2024, volume IV: Suspicious infrastructure from phishing-as-a-service (PhaaS) platforms
item.description: Volume IV of our Q3 2024 Quarterly Threat Report focuses on phishing-as-a-service (PaaS). Learn what to focus on right now.

item.title: Security alert: Fortinet zero-day vulnerability
item.description: Fortinet has disclosed a zero-day vulnerability that needs to be patched immediately, or the protocol connection to the internet should be disabled.

item.title: Securing your cloud investment: an interactive panel with AWS, Expel & Wiz
item.description: Expel, AWS & Wiz joined forces with customers to discuss the challenges of cloud security today, and what's to come in the future.

item.title: Expel Quarterly Threat Report Q3 2024, volume V: Preparing for software supply chain risk
item.description: Volume V of our Q3 2024 Quarterly Threat Report focuses on preparing for software supply chain risk. Learn what to focus on right now.

item.title: Mandia unplugged: a recap of our fireside chat with our newest board member, Kevin Mandia
item.description: Check out this summary of Expel CEO David Merkel's chat with Expel's newest board member, cybersecurity pioneer Kevin Mandia, founder of Mandiant.

item.title: Happy Halloween! Cybersecurity horror stories from SOCs past
item.description: Enjoy these horror stories from past SOCs, as our analysts share their most haunting tales from previous roles (and get some tips, too).

item.title: A secure world is built together: closing out Cybersecurity Awareness Month
item.description: It's the end of Cybersecurity Awareness Month, but these resources are useful every month of the year to enhance resilience and stay secure.

item.title: Part I: How MDR can transform your SIEM investment
item.description: This part one of a three-part blog series on how MDR can transform your SIEM investment by augmenting and optimizing its capabilities.

item.title: MDR insights: defense against persistent threats and Oracle WebLogic CVE-2020-14882
item.description: Initial access broker (IAB) Magnet Goblin is currently targeting CVE-2020-14882 in Oracle WebLogic. Here's how to identify and stop them.

item.title: Patch Tuesday roundup for November 2024
item.description: The November 2024 edition of Patch Tuesday is live, including 89 published CVEs from Microsoft. Here are our top takeaways.

item.title: Part II: How MDR can transform your SIEM investment
item.description: This is part two of a three-part blog series on how MDR can transform your SIEM investment by augmenting and optimizing its capabilities.

item.title: Part III: How MDR can transform your SIEM investment
item.description: This is part three of a three-part blog series on how MDR can transform your SIEM investment by augmenting and optimizing its capabilities.

item.title: Security alert: Palo Alto Networks firewall vulnerability
item.description: Palto Alto Networks (PAN) has a critical vulnerability that needs to be patched immediately to prevent access to networks via the firewall management interface.

item.title: A recap of our conversation on combatting security team burnout
item.description: This on-demand webinar discusses burnout in cybersecurity, its downstream impact, and strategies you can use to combat it.

item.title: Part I: Fundamentals of Kubernetes security
item.description: Learn about the fundamentals of Kubernetes, including its architecture, challenges, and false positives in part one of this two-part blog series.

item.title: Part II: Fundamentals of Kubernetes security
item.description: Learn about the fundamentals of Kubernetes, including the four Cs of Kubernetes security and how Expel can help protect it.

item.title: SOC-ful of gratitude: a Thanksgiving message
item.description: Enjoy this special holiday message from Expel employees to our SOC. We're thankful to all of you for protecting our customers!

item.title: Patch Tuesday roundup for December 2024
item.description: The December 2024 edition of Patch Tuesday is live, including 73 published CVEs from Microsoft. Here are our top takeaways.

item.title: Greg Notch, CISO at Expel, transitions to CSO role
item.description: Expel announces that CISO Greg Notch is transitioning to a new role as Chief Security Officer (CSO), to better support customer needs.

item.title: Paws your day for some holiday cheer
item.description: Your favorite MDR provider asked our employees to submit their festive holiday pets for your enjoyment, and they delivered! Happy holidays!

item.title: Security alert: Christmas Day Chrome extension compromise
item.description: At least five Chrome extensions, including the Cyberhaven extension, were targeted on Christmas Day. Here's what you need to know.

item.title: A year in review: 2024 at Expel
item.description: Expel is rounding out 2024 with a recap of our best moments of the year. We continue to build our culture, innovate, and make noise.

item.title: Expel’s predictions for 2025: our crystal ball says…
item.description: Read what our Expel experts are predicting for AI and security in 2025. These predictions can help you continue planning for new year.

item.title: Cloud security: alerts vs. on-prem alerts (part I)
item.description: This is part one of a two-part blog on cloud security alerts, including what makes them unique and best practices for management.

item.title: Cloud security: alert best practices (part II)
item.description: This is part two of a two-part blog on cloud security alerts, including what makes them unique and best practices for management.

item.title: Reintroducing Expel’s employee resource groups (ERGs)
item.description: Expel has four employee resource groups (ERGs) open to community members and allies, because we know we're better when different.

item.title: Level up your SIEM strategy with new offerings from Expel MDR & Sumo Logic
item.description: We're announcing a cost-effective solution for your MDR, SIEM, and data storage needs with Expel MDR and Sumo Logic's new partnership.

item.title: Patch Tuesday roundup for February 2025
item.description: The February 2025 edition of Patch Tuesday is live, including 63 published CVEs from Microsoft. Here are our top takeaways.

item.title: A Valentine’s Day guide to protecting your digital heart
item.description: Happy Valentine's Day! Love is in the air, and unfortunately, so is cyber crime. Stay safe with these cybersecurity tips from Expel.

item.title: Meet the Expletive: Alex Glass, VP, Global Channel Sales & Alliances
item.description: This blog series dives into the people that make Expel tick. Meet Alex Glass, Expel's VP, Global Channel Sales & Alliances.

item.title: Expel names top security partners in inaugural Partner of the Year Awards
item.description: Expel's inaugural Partner of the Year Awards have been announced. Check out the winners, and explore partnership opportunities.

item.title: Expel named a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: MDR Services, Q1 2025
item.description: Expel named a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Managed Detection and Response Services, Q1 2025. Get the report to see how we stack up against 9 others.

item.title: Expletive spotlight: Black History Month
item.description: To round out our Black History Month celebrations, we asked Expletives to share Black innovators in tech who inspire them.

item.title: How Expel MDR protects your customers and capital
item.description: Expel MDR protects customers and capital, and is a great cybersecurity partner for financial institutions and organizations.

item.title: Expel MDR customers benefit from expanded threat intel experience
item.description: Threat Bulletins are now available in Expel Workbench™, including details on any threat hunting completed to resolve the issue.

item.title: Expel’s new Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) integration completes your cloud coverage
item.description: Expel announces new coverage for Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) to enhance our leading cloud MDR with an OCI API integration.

item.title: Patch Tuesday (Expel's version): March 2025
item.description: The March 2025 edition of Patch Tuesday is live, and this month we included ColdFusion vulnerability data Expel has seen recently.

item.title: The power of API integrations in managed detection and response (MDR)
item.description: Expel's API connection expertise is the strongest way to collect telemetry, secure your environment, and limit threats.

item.title: Expletive spotlight: Expel in Ireland
item.description: Meet three of our Irish Expletives in honor of St. Patrick's Day. Expel Ireland is hiring!

item.title: Stressed SOC? Data's your best ally to justify more resources
item.description: Use analyst workload metrics and efficiency KPIs data to build a business case for more SOC resources and increased budget.

item.title: Security data done right: A conversation on MDR, SIEM, and data storage
item.description: Catch a recap of Expel's conversation with Sumo Logic on the pitfalls of bad data storage habits, and learn how to resolve them with tips.

item.title: Meet the Expletive: Samantha Ridel, Partner Integrations Manager
item.description: Meet Samantha Ridel, a Partner Integrations Manager at Expel. Learn why she's a lead for our women's ERG, and how she feels about owls.

item.title: Expletive spotlight: Women’s History Month
item.description: To round out our Women's History Month celebrations, we asked Expletives to share their thoughts on gender parity.

item.title: Meet the Expletive: Irving B., MDR Manager
item.description: Meet our newest Expletive, MDR Manager Irving Bailiff. He's our newest hire at Expel, and has thoughts on the state of our handbook.

item.title: Comparison of cloud resources (part II): Demystifying cloud security tools
item.description: This is part two of our four-part blog series on comparing cloud resources. Part two defines the types of tools used for cloud security.

item.title: Key findings generation with GenAI
item.description: At Expel, we AI Responsibly. Our latest project focused on generating key findings (KF) to detail incident investigations.

item.title: Closing the revolving door in security: solving FinServ staffing struggles
item.description: Expel can help you maximize your FinServ security team's capabilities with our managed detection and response (MDR) and automation offerings.
